purpose: Repo-native readiness summary for Formation Medium. This is a convergence and non-promotion artifact, not source-extracted, not a pitch deck, and not a proof.

readiness_layers.label: source coverage and ledger discipline
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: The repo has source-coverage guards around canonical readout, representation caution, surfaceology interfaces, scaffold/transmutation bridges, and cosmohedron R12/R13 interfaces.
blocked_claims: source coverage is physical substrate evidence

readiness_layers.label: finite mathematical checks
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: The repo contains finite/partial finite checks for selected baseline structures, generated graph fixtures, and finite convex-polygon chord fixtures within declared scopes.
blocked_claims: partial finite checks prove Formation Medium
finite checks identify a physical substrate
generated graph fixtures are source-faithful curve enumeration
polygon chord fixtures are full source-faithful surface curve enumeration

readiness_layers.label: formal theorem status
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: Formal theorem work remains a future workstream for selected check targets.

readiness_layers.label: physical substrate identification
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: Physical-regime triage remains open; no substrate has been selected or validated. CRBSM, Route A, scattering-native, and high-resonance roles are separated for comparator discipline.
blocked_claims: Formation Medium substrate has been identified

readiness_layers.label: native settling law
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: The settling-law slot is explicit and remains open.

readiness_layers.label: engineering prototype readiness
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: Engineering remains downstream of substrate triage, settling-law specification, and finite/formal validation.

readiness_layers.label: capital-readiness framing
readiness_layers.allowed_claim: The repo can support an early technical diligence conversation about a disciplined research roadmap and evidence apparatus.

current_green_signals: source-coverage guards now cover major overclaim zones
working tree is expected to remain clean before presenting status
first tiny finite surfaceology two-curve fixture passes exact rational checks
finite surfaceology fixture family passes exact rational checks, including a three-curve multi-neighbor product case
generated surfaceology graph-fixture check passes for all 75 simple graphs on 1..4 vertices with 189 exact binary witnesses
finite polygon-chord surfaceology fixture check passes for n=4..7 with 30 chords, 56 crossing edges, and 63 maximal-noncrossing witnesses
high-resonance native comparator plan preserves CRBSM mechanism-language, Route A hardware/proxy, scattering-native comparator, and high-resonance bridge roles
critical_gaps: no surfaceology finite curve-intersection or SMT model
presentation_rule: Use this ledger as a scope boundary. Present source coverage and finite checks as evidence apparatus only. Do not present Formation Medium as built, proven, physically realized, or engineering-ready.
